description: Create a content slide on private equity valuation multiples with a vertical bar chart on the left and explanatory bullet points in a right sidebar.

header.headline: Assets in M&A transactions with PE involvement are considered overvalued by the vast majority (91%) of PE professionals
header.sub: Current status of valuation multiples – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]

main.title: What describes best the current status of valuation multiples paid during M&A transactions with PE involvement? Assets are …

items.text: Multiples paid during M&A transactions with PE involvement are seen as (slightly) overvalued by 91% of respondents (93% in 2018)
Reasons behind this include the low interest rate environment and the persistently favorable credit markets and lending environment in combination with limited investment opportunities
Only 8% of respondents believe that assets are fairly valued
